summary: Phase 2 testing completed for Cube3 3D Tic-Tac-Toe. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified theme toggle, sound toggle, undo button states, resume banner, and replay page functionality.

issues: Navbar links (PLAY, LEADERBOARD) have low visibility - dark gray text (rgb(75, 94, 117)) on dark navbar background. Links are functional but hard to see.

action_items: Consider improving navbar link contrast in light mode (optional - links are functional)
critical_code_review_comments: All Phase 2 features correctly implemented with proper data-testid attributes
Saved games correctly tied to authenticated users with upsert behavior
Replays are public (no auth required to view) as specified
Undo button correctly disabled in AI mode and enabled in local modes
Theme and sound toggles persist correctly in localStorage
Share replay functionality correctly POSTs to /replays and displays shareable URL
seed_data_creation: Created test user and session via mongosh, created saved game and replay via API for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 features all working: undo (local only), auto-save/resume, shareable replays, sound effects (Web Audio), light/dark mode toggle. Test credentials in test_credentials field. Replay page at /replay/dfa0b22427 can be used for testing. Share replay button only appears in result-overlay after game ends (cannot test via Playwright due to 3D cell click limitations).

backend: GET /api/games/saved returns null when no saved game
POST /api/games/saved with valid token saves game
GET /api/games/saved returns doc when exists (board_size, mode, moves, user_id, updated_at)
POST /api/replays with auth creates replay with user name
frontend: Theme toggle (data-testid='nav-theme-toggle') - adds/removes 'light' class on html, persists in localStorage (cube3_theme)
Undo button (data-testid='undo-btn') visible and disabled when no moves in local_2p mode
Undo button disabled in ai_medium mode (AI mode)
Resume banner (data-testid='resume-banner') appears for authenticated user with saved game
Resume button (data-testid='resume-btn') and discard button (data-testid='discard-saved-btn') present
Replay page (/replay/{valid_id}) - renders 3D canvas, replay-info panel, replay-controls
Replay controls: play/pause, rewind, skip, speed buttons (0/1/2) all present
Light mode visual appearance - theme persists across navigation

notes.share_replay_button: Cannot test actual share flow via Playwright because result-overlay only appears after game ends, and 3D cell clicks are not deterministic. Code review confirms data-testid='share-btn', 'share-url', 'copy-url-btn' are correctly implemented in Play.jsx lines 317-328.
notes.sound_effects: Sound effects use Web Audio API (no assets). Cannot verify audio output via Playwright but mute toggle state persists correctly.
